cards.id: Unique identifier for each card, ensuring distinct entries in the database.
cards.artist: Name of the artist who illustrated the card, adding artistic value.
cards.asciiName: Alternative name representation, often used for unique or thematic card titles.
cards.availability: Indicates where the card can be played, enhancing accessibility for users.
cards.borderColor: Visual style of the card's border, affecting its aesthetic appeal.
cards.cardKingdomFoilId: Unique identifier for foil versions of cards, aiding in inventory management.
cards.cardKingdomId: Unique identifier for cards in the Card Kingdom database, facilitating tracking.
cards.colorIdentity: Defines the color identity of the card, crucial for gameplay mechanics.
cards.colorIndicator: Shows the color indicator for the card, influencing deck-building strategies.
cards.colors: Lists the colors associated with the card, impacting its gameplay and synergy.
cards.convertedManaCost: Represents the total mana cost required to cast the card.
cards.duelDeck: Indicates the specific duel deck the card belongs to, if applicable.
cards.edhrecRank: Ranks the card's popularity in EDH (Commander) formats based on usage statistics.
cards.faceConvertedManaCost: Shows the mana cost for the card's face, if it has multiple faces.
cards.faceName: The name of the card's face, relevant for multi-faced cards.
cards.flavorName: Describes the thematic name associated with the card's lore or flavor.
cards.flavorText: Provides narrative context or thematic quotes related to the card's story.
cards.frameEffects: Lists any special visual effects applied to the card's frame.
cards.frameVersion: Indicates the version of the card frame used in its design.
cards.hand: Represents the number of cards in hand, relevant for gameplay mechanics.
cards.hasAlternativeDeckLimit: Indicates if the card has restrictions for alternative deck usage.
cards.hasContentWarning: Specifies whether the card contains potentially sensitive content.
cards.hasFoil: Indicates if the card is available in a foil version.
cards.hasNonFoil: Specifies if the card is available in a non-foil version.
cards.isAlternative: Indicates if the card is an alternative version of another card.
cards.isFullArt: Specifies if the card features full art design without borders.
cards.isOnlineOnly: Indicates if the card is exclusively available in online formats.
cards.isOversized: Specifies if the card is larger than standard card dimensions.
cards.isPromo: Indicates if the card is a promotional item.
cards.isReprint: Specifies if the card is a reprint of a previously released card.
cards.isReserved: Indicates if the card is currently reserved for use.
cards.isStarter: Identifies if the card is part of a starter set.
cards.isStorySpotlight: Marks the card as a highlight in the story narrative.
cards.isTextless: Denotes whether the card has no text on it.
cards.isTimeshifted: Indicates if the card has been altered from its original version.
cards.keywords: Contains gameplay keywords that define card abilities and interactions.
cards.layout: Describes the physical arrangement or format of the card.
cards.leadershipSkills: Specifies the card's compatibility with various game formats.
cards.life: Represents the life points associated with the card.
cards.loyalty: Indicates the loyalty points of a planeswalker card.
cards.manaCost: Represents the resource cost required to play the card in the game.
cards.mcmId: Unique identifier for each card, used for cataloging and referencing purposes.
cards.mcmMetaId: Identifier for card metadata, linking to additional card information and attributes.
cards.mtgArenaId: Unique ID for cards in the MTG Arena digital platform, facilitating online gameplay.
cards.mtgjsonV4Id: Unique 36-character identifier for cards in the MTG JSON database format.
cards.mtgoFoilId: Identifier for foil versions of cards in the Magic Online platform.
cards.mtgoId: Unique identifier for cards in the Magic Online system, used for digital gameplay.
cards.multiverseId: Unique identifier for cards across various Magic: The Gathering universes and editions.
cards.name: The card's name, representing its identity and flavor within the game.
cards.number: A unique identifier for card variations, often indicating print run or edition.
cards.originalReleaseDate: Indicates the date a card was first released, valuable for historical context.
cards.originalText: Contains the card's text, detailing its abilities and effects for gameplay.
cards.originalType: Specifies the card's type, essential for understanding its role in play.
cards.otherFaceIds: Holds IDs for alternate card faces, useful for double-faced cards identification.
cards.power: Represents the card's power, crucial for determining combat effectiveness.
cards.printings: Lists all sets in which the card has been printed, indicating its availability.
cards.promoTypes: Describes promotional types associated with the card, highlighting special editions.
cards.purchaseUrls: Provides links to purchase the card from various online retailers.
cards.rarity: Indicates the card's rarity level, influencing its collectability and value.
cards.scryfallId: Unique identifier for the card in the Scryfall database, ensuring accurate referencing.
cards.scryfallIllustrationId: Unique identifier for card illustrations, ensuring distinct visual representations.
cards.scryfallOracleId: Unique identifier for card text, linking to official game rules and descriptions.
cards.setCode: Abbreviation representing the specific set a card belongs to, aiding in organization.
cards.side: Indicates the side of a double-faced card, denoting its alternate form.
cards.subtypes: Specific classifications of cards, providing additional context and gameplay mechanics.
cards.supertypes: Broad categories that define card characteristics, influencing gameplay and interactions.
cards.tcgplayerProductId: Unique identifier for products on TCGPlayer, facilitating inventory and sales tracking.
cards.text: Descriptive text detailing card abilities and effects, crucial for gameplay understanding.
cards.toughness: Numeric value representing a creature's resilience, impacting its survival in combat.
cards.type: Defines the card's category, influencing its role and interactions in gameplay.
cards.types: Categorizes card mechanics and roles, enhancing gameplay understanding and strategy.
cards.uuid: Unique identifier for each card, ensuring distinct identification across the database.
cards.variations: Represents different versions or printings of a card, preserving historical and collectible value.
cards.watermark: Indicates the thematic or factional branding of a card, enriching lore and gameplay context.

foreign_data.id: Unique identifier for each record in the foreign_data table.
foreign_data.flavorText: Descriptive text providing context or thematic elements for each entry.
foreign_data.language: Language in which the associated text or flavor is presented.
foreign_data.multiverseid: Identifier linking entries to specific multiverse contexts or scenarios.
foreign_data.name: Title or name associated with the entry, often reflecting its essence.
foreign_data.text: Core content or message related to the entry, often in various languages.
foreign_data.type: Categorization of the entry, indicating its nature or function.
foreign_data.uuid: Universally unique identifier ensuring distinct identification across systems.

legalities.id: Unique identifier for each legal entry in the database.
legalities.format: Type of legal format, indicating the style or rules of play.
legalities.status: Current legal status of the entry, indicating its playability.
legalities.uuid: Universally unique identifier for each record, ensuring distinct identification.

sets.id: Unique identifier for each set in the database.
sets.baseSetSize: Total number of cards in the base set.
sets.block: The thematic grouping or expansion set of the cards.
sets.booster: Details about the booster pack contents and structure.
sets.code: Abbreviated identifier for each set, used for reference.
sets.isFoilOnly: Indicates if the set contains only foil cards.
sets.isForeignOnly: Specifies if the set includes only foreign language cards.
sets.isNonFoilOnly: Indicates if the set contains only non-foil cards.
sets.isOnlineOnly: Specifies if the set is available exclusively online.
sets.isPartialPreview: Indicates if the set is a partial preview of upcoming cards.
sets.keyruneCode: Unique identifier for each set, representing its specific code.
sets.mcmId: Numeric identifier for the set, indicating its position in the collection.
sets.mcmIdExtras: Additional numeric identifiers for sets, providing extra categorization.
sets.mcmName: Descriptive name of the set, indicating its theme or content.
sets.mtgoCode: Code used for Magic: The Gathering Online, representing the set.
sets.name: Official name of the set, detailing its specific release or variant.
sets.parentCode: Code indicating the parent set, linking related expansions.
sets.releaseDate: Date when the set was officially released, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.
sets.tcgplayerGroupId: Identifier for the set in TCGPlayer's database, aiding in inventory management.
sets.totalSetSize: Total number of cards in the set, reflecting its size and scope.
sets.type: Categorizes the nature of the card set, indicating its purpose and format.

set_translations.id: Unique identifier for each translation entry in the dataset.
set_translations.language: Language in which the set is translated, indicating regional accessibility.
set_translations.setCode: Three-character code representing the specific card set for translation.
set_translations.translation: Textual representation of the set's name in the specified language.

rulings.id: Unique identifier for each ruling, ensuring distinct entries in the database.
rulings.date: Date when the ruling was issued, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.
rulings.text: Detailed explanation of the ruling, providing context and clarifications on game mechanics.
rulings.uuid: Universally unique identifier for each ruling, ensuring global uniqueness across systems.
